caption: A man wearing a black baseball cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" is seated in a studio setting. He wears a gold chain around his neck and is positioned in front of a professional microphone. In the background, a white wall features the words "HUSTLE" and a series of yellow stars, while a darker backdrop displays the words "BOSS TALK 101." Overlaid on the bottom of the scene are graphics including a "BOSS TALK PODCAST" logo and "BOSS TALK 101." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and mouth, shifting his gaze and expression as he talks. His posture remains relatively still, focused on the conversation occurring in the studio environment.
